chapter_title.en: Places Where Prayer is Permissable and Where it is Not Permissable

text: 745 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سَمَاعَةُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ: عَنِ اَلْأَسِيرِ يَأْسِرُهُ اَلْمُشْرِكُونَ فَتَحْضُرُهُ اَلصَّلاَةُ فَيَمْنَعُهُ اَلَّذِي أَسَرَهُ مِنْهَا فَقَالَ «يُومِئُ إِيمَاءً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.745 - Sama’a ibn Mehran asked Him about a captive taken by the polytheists who is prevented from performing prayer by his captor.
Imam (as) said: "He should make gestures (for prayer)."
